Name: Copia
Superfamily / Notes: One of the most common LTR retrotransposons.

Name: Gypsy
Superfamily / Notes: LTR retrotransposon, often abundant in plants/fungi.

Name: DIRS
Superfamily / Notes: Unusual LTR-like elements with tyrosine recombinase.

Name: Ngaro
Superfamily / Notes: Related to DIRS; common in eukaryotes/fungi.

Name: LTRU
Superfamily / Notes: "LTR-Unclassified"—likely an LTR element of unknown family.

Name: IS3EU
Superfamily / Notes: Eukaryotic elements related to bacterial IS3 sequences.

Name: Satellite
Superfamily / Notes: Not a TE. This is tandemly repeated DNA.
